title: Tender Crunchy Kenyan Cabbage Salad
description: A refreshing and crunchy salad made with hispi sweetheart cabbage, inspired by Kenyan cuisine and friendly to Ayurvedic and sattvic diets.
instructions: Shred the hispi sweetheart cabbage into thin strips.
Heat the coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the namul blanch seasoning to the pan and saut9 for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the shredded cabbage to the pan and stir to combine with the seasoning mixture.
Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the cabbage is slightly tender but still crisp.
Transfer the cabbage mixture to a bowl and stir in the lime juice, honey, cilantro, red onion, cashews, salt, and black pepper.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves and serve immediately.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together before serving.
This salad can be made ahead and stored in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
To make the salad more substantial, add cooked chickpeas or tofu to the mixture before serving.
